_publications._publicationTitle: Neuronal hyperexcitability drives central and peripheral nervous system tumor progression in models of neurofibromatosis-1.

_contextSnippet: both human and murine cutaneous and plexiform neurofibromas exhibited strong COL1A2 immunoreactivity, in contrast to minimal expression in normal sural and sciatic nerves
details: Successfully detected COL1A2 expression in human and mouse neurofibromas with strong immunoreactivity, while showing minimal expression in normal nerves
